primary_archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Public: Light, Admin: Dark)
design_philosophy: The system features two radically distinct surfaces sharing the same organic brand DNA. The Public Directory is an editorial guide: warm, tactile, trusting, and minimal. The Admin/Ops Dashboard is a dense, high-contrast, dark-mode control room optimized for data triage and operations.

typography.font_pairing: Cormorant Garamond (Public Editorial Headings) + Outfit (Public UI/Body) + JetBrains Mono (Admin Data)

public.h1: font-serif text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tight text-[#1A3A32] leading-none
public.h3: font-sans text-xl sm:text-2xl font-medium tracking-tight text-[#1A3A32]
public.label: font-sans text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#708265] font-semibold

public_directory.strategy: Generous Spacing, Tetris Bento Grid for Featured content.
public_directory.card_style: bg-[#FAFAF7] border border-[#E5DFD3] rounded-xl p-6 md:p-8 shadow-sm transition-transform duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md

admin_dashboard.strategy: Control Room Grid, Dense Data, Grid Borders.
admin_dashboard.card_style: bg-[#15201D] border border-[#243631] rounded-lg p-4 shadow-none

buttons.public_primary: bg-[#1A3A32] text-[#F5F2EB] px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-sans font-medium transition-all hover:bg-[#2A5A4A] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D06D4F] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.public_accent: bg-[#D06D4F] text-[#F5F2EB] px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-sans font-medium transition-all hover:bg-[#B85C40]
buttons.admin_action: bg-[#243631] text-[#F5F2EB] border border-[#3A524A] px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-sans text-sm hover:bg-[#3A524A] transition-colors

badges.verified: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-[#E8F2EE] text-[#2A5A4A] font-sans text-xs font-semibold border border-[#BDE0D2]
badges.unverified: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-[#FFF4E6] text-[#C98544] font-sans text-xs font-semibold border border-[#FAD9B3]
badges.admin_status: px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono uppercase tracking-wider rounded border

forms.public_input: w-full bg-[#FAFAF7] border border-[#E5DFD3] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-[#1A3A32] placeholder-[#8B9E98] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#708265] focus:border-transparent transition-all
forms.admin_input: w-full bg-[#0D1412] border border-[#243631] rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-[#F5F2EB] font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D06D4F]

surfaces.public_header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F5F2EB]/80 border-b border-[#E5DFD3]/50
surfaces.admin_header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0D1412] border-b border-[#243631]

motion_and_interactions.public_hover_states: Interactive cards lift (-translate-y-1) with a subtle shadow expansion. Text links underline or shift to Terracotta (#D06D4F).
motion_and_interactions.public_page_transitions: Subtle fade-in with 10px upward translation on load (Framer Motion).
motion_and_interactions.admin_interactions: Instant, snappy feedback. Hover states subtly lighten backgrounds (bg-[#1D2D29]) without changing geometry to preserve data alignment.

iconography.strategy: Sparingly use icons on the public site (location pins, verified checkmarks) to maintain editorial feel. Admin uses icons extensively for dense menus, status flags, and table operations.

hero_background.description: Person and dog in a sunlit forest path. Use for the public directory hero section.
hero_background.treatment: Split layout or overlay with gradient-to-b from-black/40 to-transparent to ensure readable typography.

trainer_action.description: A trainer with a Belgian Malinois performing obedience training. Use for SEO landing pages, about section, or AI wizard.

trainer_profile_1.description: Woman and dog on a leash. Use for featured trainer card avatar/profile picture.

trainer_profile_2.description: Man holding a dog. Use for featured trainer card avatar/profile picture.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: yarn add lucide-react framer-motion
Include Google Fonts imports for 'Cormorant Garamond' (serif), 'Outfit' (sans), and 'JetBrains Mono' (mono) in index.css.
Configure Tailwind config using the dual color palettes provided (Public light themes vs Admin dark themes).
Public Directory: Avoid standard SaaS cards. Use generous padding, warm backgrounds (#F5F2EB), and editorial serif headings.
Admin Dashboard: Build a passcode-gated route that switches entirely to the dark theme (#0D1412 background) with grid-borders.
Implement the 'AI matching wizard' with large friendly inputs (Outfit font) and an engaging step-by-step UI.
Trainers detail pages must include lead capture forms with transparent dashboard previews.
Admin features must include ingestion queue tables with AI confidence scores, MRR analytics, and A/B test toggles.
Apply 'Verified' or 'Unverified' trust badges prominently in directory results.
Strictly use the provided image URLs; do not fallback to placeholder services.
Ensure ALL interactive elements contain 'data-testid' attributes.
